+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al
@@ -1309,14 +1309,14 @@ codeunit 99000774 "Calculate Routing Line"

         MaxLotSize :=
-          ExpectedOperOutput *
+          ProdOrderQty *
           (1 + ProdOrderRoutingLine."Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)") *
           (1 + TotalScrap / 100) +
           ProdOrderRoutingLine."Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)";
 
         OnCalculateRoutingLineOnAfterCalcMaxLotSize(ProdOrderQty, ProdOrderRoutingLine, TotalScrap, MaxLotSize);
 
-        ProdOrderRoutingLine."Input Quantity" := MaxLotSize;
+        ProdOrderRoutingLine."Input Quantity" := ProdOrderQty;
 
         if ActualOperOutput > 0 then
             TotalQtyPerOperation :=

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
index 15a14be1..b9c602b1 100644

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
@@ -1310,6 +1310,11 @@ codeunit 99000832 "Sales Line-Reserve"
         if Item."Costing Method" <> Item."Costing Method"::FIFO then
             exit(false);
 
+        // If the line was created from a shipment (Get Shipment Lines) or return receipt (Get Return Receipt Lines), 
+        // do not delete all reservation entries
+        if (NewSalesLine."Shipment No." <> '') or (NewSalesLine."Return Receipt No." <> '') then
+            exit(false);
+
         exit(NewSalesLine.Quantity < OldSalesLine.Quantity);
     end;
